REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $80.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADABAHSIAN, MARION AS TO DEFENDANT BENJAMIN, SCOTT

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ADABAHSIAN, MARION
